mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, hotel_id, hotel_name, hotel_image, room_name, amount, name, phone, check_in_date, check_out_date, nights, status, user_openid, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{hotelId}, #{hotelName}, #{hotelImage}, #{roomName}, #{amount}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{nights}, #{status}, #{userOpenid}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: UPDATE orders SET delete_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
